Description: EverMemOS is an open source “memory operating system” from EverMind that adds durable, structured long term memory to AI agents. It focuses on letting LLM based assistants remember past interactions, build evolving user profiles, and reason with context instead of treating every prompt as a clean slate. Under the hood it uses a four layer architecture that mirrors aspects of human cognition: an agentic layer for planning, a memory layer for storage and recall, an index layer for embeddings and key value search, and an API / MCP interface layer that plugs into external systems.
